labels.name: solana_scan_pool_liquidity
labels.description:
Use this when you need to check liquidity depth of a Solana DEX pool before trading. Returns TVL, slippage estimates, volume, and fee tier for pools matching a token mint. POST variant of solana_scan_pool_liquidity -- same params passed as JSON body instead of query string.

1. pools: array of DEX p

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: solana_scan_pool_liquidity · Private data: solana_scan_pool_liquidity, solana_scan_pool_liquidity · Public sink: solana_scan_pool_liquidity.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: solana_scan_pool_liquidity · Private data: solana_scan_pool_liquidity, solana_scan_pool_liquidity · Public sink: solana_scan_pool_liquidity

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.

findings.title: Tool description changed since last scan
findings.detail: Tool "solana_scan_pool_liquidity" changed its description with no version change. Silent description changes are how a trusted server turns malicious after review.

evidence.snippet:
before: "(hash 4282b496)" → after: "Use this when you need to check liquidity depth of a Solana DEX pool before trading. Returns TVL, slippage estimates, volume, and fee tier for pools matching a token mint. POST variant of solana_scan_pool_liquidity -- same params passed as JSON body instead of query string.

1. pools: array of DEX p"

findings.remediation: Re-review the tool before continuing to trust it.
